title: Ordzaar
summary: Built the first prototype as sole developer. Fully decentralised, on-chain marketplace with no traditional database. Became CakeDefi's fifth business vertical, then spun out independently.
outcome: Sole prototype dev. Became CakeDefi's 5th vertical, then independent startup.

title: CoKeeps
tagline: Malaysia's first regulated Digital Asset Custodian
summary: Co-founded and funded through R1. Five years from concept to regulatory approval. Designed compliance architecture, KYC/AML pipelines, and custody infrastructure.
outcome: First company in Malaysia approved as a regulated Digital Asset Custodian.

title: Oviato
summary: Co-founded and led the technical pivot from consumer app to passkey-native wallet infrastructure. Built on a weekend hackathon prototype. The pivot secured DraperVC investment.
outcome: Secured DraperVC investment. Pivoted from consumer app to B2B infrastructure.

title: Neuroware
summary: 500 Startups Batch 9, launched at TechCrunch Disrupt London. Open-source blockchain wallet and SDK infrastructure handling 1M+ API requests. The only Malaysian company in Deloitte's Top 50 Global RegTech.
outcome: Deloitte Top 50 RegTech. $300K+ raised. TechCrunch Disrupt launch.

title: R1
tagline: 13 years of blockchain infrastructure, from first principles
summary: Holding and operating company behind Neuroware, CoKeeps, Blockchain Embassy, and more. First company in the SC Malaysia regulatory sandbox. Enterprise clients include DBS Bank and Baker Hostetler.
outcome: First SC Malaysia sandbox company, incubated 5+ ventures, advised national regulators

title: Moddable Games
tagline: Open-source games studio with AI-callable MCP tools and Consumer SDKs
summary: Open-source games studio shipped in 16 days using AI-augmented engineering. Two engines (chess v0.9.1 + hexmaps v0.8.1), six games, Consumer SDKs, and the first board game MCP server (15 AI-callable tools at tools.moddable.games). Native ESM, zero dependencies, zero build step.
outcome: 2 engines, 6 games, 15 MCP tools, 2 Consumer SDKs. 16 days to production, solo founder.

title: SADO Protocol
tagline: Decentralised trading protocol for Bitcoin Ordinals
summary: Co-authored decentralised trading protocol for Bitcoin Ordinals. Open-source SDK adopted by Ordzaar and third-party exchanges.
outcome: Open standard adopted across the Ordinals ecosystem.

title: Project Castor
tagline: SC Malaysia blockchain blueprint and custody framework
summary: Two-year blockchain advisory with Malaysia's Securities Commission, leading to the Digital Asset Custodian regulatory framework.
outcome: Directly informed national Digital Asset Custodian regulation.

title: Project Eden
summary: Weekend hackathon prototype proving passkey-native crypto wallets without passwords or seed phrases. Evolved into Oviato.
outcome: Weekend prototype that became Oviato (DraperVC-funded startup).

title: BloqVerse
tagline: On-chain multiplayer game platform on Ethereum
summary: On-chain multiplayer game platform built on 30+ interconnected Ethereum smart contracts. Emerged from research at the Blockchain Embassy.
outcome: 30+ smart contracts, fully serverless architecture with IPFS frontend.
